header_subtitle: Create bootable USB drives with ease.
about_text: ReadyBoot is a simple, lightweight, and efficient tool to create bootable USB drives from ISO files. Whether you're installing a new OS, running diagnostics, or recovering a system — ReadyBoot makes the job quick and easy.
aboutus_text: Welcome to ReadyBoot – your lightweight, fast, and reliable solution for creating bootable USB drives. Developed by Kuldeep Prajapati, ReadyBoot was built to simplify bootable media creation without complex installations.
